title: Spicy Tostada Dessert
description: A sweet and spicy dessert tostada recipe made with crunchy tostadas topped with a sweet and spicy sugar mixture.
instructions: Crush the tostadas into small pieces and spread on a baking sheet.
Bake the tostadas for 5-7 minutes or until crispy.
In a small saucepan, combine the sugar and free over low heat.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the sugar has dissolved and the mixture is smooth.
Remove the tostada pieces from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Drizzle the sugar mixture over the tostada pieces and serve.
